nasb.text: And after he had been set outside, Pharaoh’s daughter took him away and nurtured him as her own son.

esv.text: and when he was exposed, Pharaoh’s daughter adopted him and brought him up as her own son.

cnv.text: 他被拋棄的時候，法老的女兒把他拾起來，當作兒子撫養。

ccb.text: 最后不得已才丢弃他。法老的女儿救了他，收为养子。

csbs.text: 后来他被丢弃的时候，法老的女儿把他捡去，当做自己的儿子抚养。
